column39:
MY SUPERPOWER:
1. Read other people’s emotions, motivations, needs.
 2. Generate loyalty, reliability and a sense of community in a group of people or in a cause by being the glue that sticks them together.
 3. Look at things holistically and identify the ways in which seemingly unrelated ideas or events are connected and part of a greater whole.
I am especially good at these when I use Musical Intelligence or “sound smarts”:
- distinguishing and appreciating the different elements of music; being a keen listener of music;
- excelling in the capacity to create, remember, and discern musical patterns, as well as melodies, beats, and songs.
